title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!
